Method.desc: Immediately refresh all enabled sources/locales. Aggregates Bing and/or Spotlight images into one roster, downloads any new files, and restarts rotation when the feed changes.
Method.doc: Immediately refresh all enabled sources/locales. Aggregates Bing and/or Spotlight images into one roster, downloads any new files, and restarts rotation when the feed changes.
Method.name: update

Method.desc: Immediately rotate the wallpaper. If index is supplied, switch to that 1-based item in the current roster; otherwise switch to the next item.
Method.doc: Immediately rotate the wallpaper. If index is supplied, switch to that 1-based item in the current roster; otherwise switch to the next item.
Method.name: rotateNow

Method.desc: Print and return current source, locale, file, cleanup, and rotation status for debugging.
Method.doc: Print and return current source, locale, file, cleanup, and rotation status for debugging.
Method.name: status

Method.desc: Return the number of downloaded wallpapers in the current active roster.
Method.doc: Return the number of downloaded wallpapers in the current active roster.
Method.name: downloadedCount

Method.desc: Start periodic feed refreshes and wallpaper rotation.
Method.doc: Start periodic feed refreshes and wallpaper rotation.
Method.name: start

Method.desc: Stop periodic refreshes, stop wallpaper rotation, and cancel any active download.
Method.doc: Stop periodic refreshes, stop wallpaper rotation, and cancel any active download.
Method.name: stop

Variable.desc: Wallpaper sources to use. Accepts "bing", "spotlight", "both", or a table such as {"bing", "spotlight"}. Defaults to {"bing", "spotlight"}.
Variable.doc: Wallpaper sources to use. Accepts "bing", "spotlight", "both", or a table such as {"bing", "spotlight"}. Defaults to {"bing", "spotlight"}.
Variable.name: sources

Variable.desc: Bing locales/markets to check. Accepts a single locale string, a table of locales, or the string "all" to use the built-in locale list. Defaults to {"en-US"}.
Variable.doc: Bing locales/markets to check. Accepts a single locale string, a table of locales, or the string "all" to use the built-in locale list. Defaults to {"en-US"}.
Variable.name: bing_locales

Variable.desc: Windows Spotlight locales to check. Accepts a single locale string, a table of locales, or the string "all" to use the built-in locale list. Defaults to {"en-US"}.
Variable.doc: Windows Spotlight locales to check. Accepts a single locale string, a table of locales, or the string "all" to use the built-in locale list. Defaults to {"en-US"}.
Variable.name: spotlight_locales

Variable.desc: Built-in locale list used when bing_locales or spotlight_locales is set to "all". You can replace or extend this table if you want a larger or smaller carousel.
Variable.doc: Built-in locale list used when bing_locales or spotlight_locales is set to "all". You can replace or extend this table if you want a larger or smaller carousel.
Variable.name: all_locales

Variable.desc: If true, request Bing wallpapers in UHD when available. Defaults to true.
Variable.doc: If true, request Bing wallpapers in UHD when available. Defaults to true.
Variable.name: uhd_resolution

Variable.desc: Number of Spotlight images to request per locale. Spotlight API v4 allows 1 to 4. Defaults to 4.
Variable.doc: Number of Spotlight images to request per locale. Spotlight API v4 allows 1 to 4. Defaults to 4.
Variable.name: spotlight_image_count

Variable.desc: If true, request Spotlight portrait images; if false, request landscape images; if nil, infer from the main screen. Defaults to nil.
Variable.doc: If true, request Spotlight portrait images; if false, request landscape images; if nil, infer from the main screen. Defaults to nil.
Variable.name: spotlight_portrait

Variable.desc: If true, fall back to the older Spotlight v3 API when v4 returns no images for a locale. Defaults to true.
Variable.doc: If true, fall back to the older Spotlight v3 API when v4 returns no images for a locale. Defaults to true.
Variable.name: spotlight_v3_fallback

Variable.desc: How often to refresh feeds, in seconds. Defaults to 3 hours.
Variable.doc: How often to refresh feeds, in seconds. Defaults to 3 hours.
Variable.name: interval

Variable.desc: If true, rotate evenly across cycle_seconds when rotate_every_minutes is nil or 0. Defaults to true.
Variable.doc: If true, rotate evenly across cycle_seconds when rotate_every_minutes is nil or 0. Defaults to true.
Variable.name: rotate_within_cycle

Variable.desc: Length of one full rotation cycle, in seconds, when using cycle-based rotation. Defaults to 24 hours.
Variable.doc: Length of one full rotation cycle, in seconds, when using cycle-based rotation. Defaults to 24 hours.
Variable.name: cycle_seconds

Variable.desc: If set to a positive number, rotate wallpapers every X minutes instead of using cycle_seconds. Defaults to nil.
Variable.doc: If set to a positive number, rotate wallpapers every X minutes instead of using cycle_seconds. Defaults to nil.
Variable.name: rotate_every_minutes

Variable.desc: If true, shuffle the roster whenever a new feed is downloaded. Defaults to false.
Variable.doc: If true, shuffle the roster whenever a new feed is downloaded. Defaults to false.
Variable.name: randomize

Variable.desc: Directory where downloaded images are stored. Defaults to ~/.Trash/BingSpotlightDaily so they behave like temporary files.
Variable.doc: Directory where downloaded images are stored. Defaults to ~/.Trash/BingSpotlightDaily so they behave like temporary files.
Variable.name: save_dir

Variable.desc: If true, after each successful update permanently remove old Spoon-managed image files from save_dir that are no longer part of the active roster. Defaults to true.
Variable.doc: If true, after each successful update permanently remove old Spoon-managed image files from save_dir that are no longer part of the active roster. Defaults to true.
Variable.name: cleanup_old_images

Variable.desc: If true, detect exact duplicate downloaded image files by checksum, delete duplicate files, and keep only one roster item per unique image before rotation starts. Defaults to true.
Variable.doc: If true, detect exact duplicate downloaded image files by checksum, delete duplicate files, and keep only one roster item per unique image before rotation starts. Defaults to true.
Variable.name: dedupe_images

Variable.desc: If true, show a notification whenever the wallpaper changes. Defaults to false.
Variable.doc: If true, show a notification whenever the wallpaper changes. Defaults to false.
Variable.name: show_notifications

Variable.desc: User-Agent string used for API requests and image downloads. Defaults to "Mozilla/5.0".
Variable.doc: User-Agent string used for API requests and image downloads. Defaults to "Mozilla/5.0".
Variable.name: user_agent

Variable.desc: Minimum time each wallpaper should stay on screen. Defaults to 60 seconds.
Variable.doc: Minimum time each wallpaper should stay on screen. Defaults to 60 seconds.
Variable.name: min_rotation_seconds

desc: Unified Bing + Windows Spotlight wallpaper rotation for macOS via Hammerspoon.
doc: Unified Bing + Windows Spotlight wallpaper rotation for macOS via Hammerspoon. Choose Bing, Spotlight, or both; fetch one, many, or all configured locales; remove exact duplicate downloads; and rotate through the unique wallpapers automatically.
